courseName: Turbine Aeroplane Aerodynamics Structures and Systems 5
deptName: ช่างอากาศยาน
standardRef: EASA PART 66 MODULE 11A TURBINE AEROPLANE AERODYNAMICS STRUCTURES AND SYSTEMS
learningOutcomes:
Be able to know, understand, explain and apply the Aircraft Instrument, Aircraft Lights
System, Avionic System including Auto Flight System, Communication System and Navigation
System in practical and have a good attitude to work neatly, be patience with work, a habit
of working carefully and safety.
objectives:
1. Be able to know and understand the Aircraft Instrument, Avionic System including
Auto Flight System, Communication System, Navigation System and Aircraft Lights System.
2. Be able to explain the Avionic System including Auto Flight System, Communication
System, Navigation System and Aircraft Lights System.
3. Have a good attitude to work neatly, be patience with work, a habit of working
carefully and safety.
4. Be able to apply Aircraft Instrument, Avionic System including Auto Flight System,
Communication System, Navigation System and Aircraft Lights System knowledge in practical
and higher education.
competencies:
1. Describe and codify knowledge about Aircraft Instrument, Avionic System including
Auto Flight System, Communication System, Navigation System and Aircraft Lights System.
2. Apply knowledge for the Aircraft Instrument, Avionic System including Auto Flight
System, Communication System, Navigation System and Aircraft Lights System.
description:
To study about Aircraft Instrument Systems (ATA 31), and Avionic System including
Auto Flight System ATA 22, Communication System ATA 23, Navigation System ATA 34 and
Aircraft Lights System ATA 33
